findings.message: New data-store query with no metric or span around it. The get_item_by_name function performs a database query without any observability instrumentation (no metrics, no spans, no logging).
findings.suggestion: Wrap the database query with observability instrumentation: add metrics for query latency and result count, add a span/trace context, and ensure any errors are logged with correlation id.

findings.message: Unobserved unbounded query on Item.name without latency or row-count metric. The WHERE clause query has no observability to track its performance impact.
findings.suggestion: Instrument the query to emit latency and row-count metrics. Additionally, add an index on Item.name in the model or migration to prevent full table scans, especially if this query is called frequently in a hot path.
